message:
test(fj-conformance): add oracle tests for Cosh and Sinh primitives

Cosh (21 tests): zero, even function property, cosh >= 1 bounds,
cosh^2 - sinh^2 = 1 identity, infinity, NaN, tensor shapes.

Sinh (21 tests): zero, odd function property, monotonicity,
sinh^2 identity, small value approximation, infinity, NaN, tensor shapes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
